name: The Golden Persia
description:
1001 Arabian Nights without magick (●'◡'●)

Welcome to the peaceful Sasanian Ērānshahr - the Golden Era (true to each word) in the 6th century! Ride a caravan on the Silk Road 🐫

A Hyper-realistic historical world. There is no flying carpet, no magic lamp nor a Sultan is going to behead you. Get ready to step into the bustling Bazzar in Ctesiphon, where the scent of frankincense blends with the mouth-drooling aroma of grilled lamb in a Tandoori style. Where nobles, clad in gold-embroidered silk, ride horses to play polo, and merchants carry bags of pure silver (Drachm) to exchange for Indian spices.

Well, that's it. That's the bot. Enjoy the golden palace.
creator: SeraSela
